with the wind is drawing blood here at

Well, there's nothing

a good delivery.

He couldn't do anything and he didn't

delivery
just bumra
getting his second wicket.
Darren Bravo he was uncomfortable in his
short stay. So his misery has been
ended. Gone for four. Two down 13 now.

it's as if BRA has left nothing from

So, first ball duck, a golden duck as
they call it to Shamra Books
at 13 for three now. The West Indies.
>> Rost Chase still averaging in the low
30s though.
>> Very organized in comparison to others.
Oh, that would have gone down the leg
side. This is marvelous bowling.

I think the excitement is what has

[Applause]
>> Austin Chase is a very very fine player.
He's gone for a first ball duck too.
It's a hattick for Bumra. 13 for four.
[Applause]
